---
title: About
---

## What This Site Is

This blog explores systems thinking across domains:
software engineering, organizations, psychology, and society.

Topics may range from software architecture to video game mechanics.
The common thread is understanding incentives, coordination, and
complexity in systems.

## Perspective

Most writing approaches problems from a systems perspective,
focusing on structures, feedback loops, and emergent behavior.

Similar patterns often appear in:

- software systems
- organizations
- markets
- social systems
- games
